title: Consorts With the Dead
summary: The dead answer your questions, and their reanimated corpses serve you.
tiers: Tier 3: Reading the Room or Repair Flesh
Tier 6: True Necromancy or Word of Death
gm_intrusions: The character’s necromantic reputation precedes them. A corpse seeks revenge for being reanimated.
text: The dead answer your questions, and their reanimated corpses serve you.
details: The dead answer your questions, and their reanimated corpses serve you.
